results.title: July 4 reading brings Declaration of Independence to life
results.description: On July 4, Glenwood Springs residents will have a chance to do more than celebrate Independence Day — they can help bring the words that started it all to life. Local historian Angie Parkison is...

results.title: What Indian travellers should know before travelling to Thailand
results.description: Indian travellers heading to Thailand must prepare essential documents before departure. The Indian embassy advises carrying a valid passport, return tickets, hotel bookings, and a travel itinerary. Completing the Thailand Digital Arrival Card (TDAC) within 72 hours of arrival is mandatory. Ensure you have the correct visa for your trip's purpose and sufficient cash if using Visa on Arrival.

results.title: Florida School Board argues teacher must still be fired for Kirk post
results.description: The Martin County School Board argues that a judge was wrong to say Matt Theobald should get his job back with back pay and benefits.

results.title: Patriots honored with flags, flowers at local gravesites in Autauga County
results.description: In Autauga County, cemeteries and gravesites are being decorated with flowers and American flags, a tribute led by the Old Autauga Historical Society, which says the county’s connection to America’s earliest patriots remains strong.
